tasks.label: C 실행 (한번에)
tasks.command: prefix=$(basename ${file} | grep -o '^[0-9]*') && labprefix=$(basename ${file} | grep -o '^lab[0-9]*-') && if [ -n "$prefix" ]; then gcc ${fileDirname}/${prefix}*.c -o ${fileDirname}/out.temp; elif [ -n "$labprefix" ]; then gcc ${fileDirname}/${labprefix}*.c -o ${fileDirname}/out.temp; else gcc ${file} -o ${fileDirname}/out.temp; fi && ${fileDirname}/out.temp && rm ${fileDirname}/out.temp
